---
name: topic-research
description: Generate blog topic ideas aligned with René's executive positioning, checking for overlap with existing posts and current relevance.
---

# Topic Research Skill

1. Read titles/tags of all existing posts in `_posts/` to avoid repeats.
2. Cross-reference against René's current focus areas: engineering culture,
   GovTech/public sector transformation, AI disruption for leaders, talent
   strategy (XMS Learning Journey, SkillSwipe/Soundings work).
3. For each candidate topic, check if it's timely (search web for very
   recent developments if the topic is fast-moving, e.g. AI/policy news).
4. Output 5-8 topic ideas as a table: Title | Angle | Why now | Est. read time.
5. Flag which ideas are strongest for LinkedIn distribution vs. which are
   better as long-form-only.
